title: Advocacy * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Advocacy * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Disabilities Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details CREATING OPPORTUNITIES REGIONAL FAMILY NETWORK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support services including information and referral, advocacy, and system navigation including Individualized Education Programs (IEPs), Developmental Disabilities (DD) services, healthcare, and other public systems. parenting classes, information and referral, and advocacy services. 680 State Street Suite #100 Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Children and youth with disabilities and their families Hours: Vary Email (503) 559-0424 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CREATING OPPORTUNITIES REGIONAL FAMILY NETWORK
